name: orbitron-tui
description: A modular TUI backend for Orbitron

scripts.build: bun build --compile src/cli.js --outfile dist/orbitron && echo '#!/bin/sh\nexec "$(dirname "$0")/../dist/orbitron" "$@"' > bin/orbitron && chmod +x bin/orbitron && cp bin/orbitron bin/ob && bun build src/main.tsx --outdir dist --target bun || true

author: johndih
